MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paula Champagne of Littler Mendelson (677.3159) for defendants and moving parties
Martin Jennings (916.791.2374) for plaintiff and responding party

Mr. Jennings clarified that there is no Coleman declaration, and the Court granted defendants' request to strike references to the declaration. Argued and the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANTS THELEN, REID, BROWN, RAYSMAN & STEINER LLP AND MARIO ALVARADO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Summary Adjudication is denied as to the 4th and 5th causes of action, and granted as to the remaining causes of action. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
